description: Evaluation cases for HPC Slurm job scaffolding skill

evals.prompt: I have a multi-node MPI model and want to run on an HPC cluster. Generate a Slurm job script.
evals.expected_output: Slurm batch script with node/task/CPU allocation, module loading, srun MPI launch
success_criteria: Script includes #SBATCH directives for nodes, ntasks-per-node, cpus-per-task
Script uses srun for MPI job launch
Resource requests are reasonable (not exceeding typical cluster limits)

evals.expected_output: Skill does not activate; ospool handles OSPool. This skill is for Slurm HPC only.

evals.prompt: Set up a job array for 500 parameter combinations on a Slurm cluster.
evals.expected_output: Slurm array submit file, parameter list (one per line), submission command with %maxjobs
success_criteria: Array directive specifies correct job count: #SBATCH --array=1-500
Output includes guidance on managing job throughput (% throttling)

evals.prompt: I need a GPU accelerated job on HPC. Generate Slurm script with CUDA/GPU support.
evals.expected_output: Slurm script with GPU resource request (#SBATCH --gres=gpu:N) and CUDA module loading
success_criteria: Script loads CUDA/cuDNN modules if available
Script includes guidance on GPU-specific environment variables

evals.prompt: Generate HTCondor configuration for parameter sweeps
evals.expected_output: Skill does not activate; ospool handles HTCondor. This skill is for Slurm HPC only.
